Layer.SetCommand: %function(self) theDay = ' ' if Weekday() == 0 then theDay = 'Sunday' elseif Weekday() == 1 then theDay = 'Monday' elseif Weekday() == 2 then theDay = 'Tuesday' elseif Weekday() == 3 then theDay = 'Wednesday' elseif Weekday() == 4 then theDay = 'Thursday' elseif Weekday() == 5 then theDay = 'Friday' elseif Weekday() == 6 then theDay = 'Saturday' end fixedHour = Hour() - math.floor(Hour()/12)*12 if fixedHour == 0 then fixedHour = 12 end tod = 'AM' if Hour() >= 12 then tod = 'PM' end if OPENITG then self:settext( string.format('System Time: %s, %s %i, %04i, %i:%02i:%02i %s', theDay, MonthToString(MonthOfYear()), DayOfMonth(), Year(), fixedHour, Minute(), Second(), tod) ) else self:settext( string.format('System Time: %s, %s %i, %04i, %i:%02i:%02i %s', theDay, MonthToString(MonthOfYear()-1), DayOfMonth(), Year(), fixedHour, Minute(), Second(), tod) ) end end
%function(self) if HubIsConnected() then self:settext('USB Card Hub Status: Connected Properly') else self:settext('USB Card Hub Status: Not Present or Not Connected Properly') end end
